title: Write For The Interpreter
gist: The Interpreter's contributor guidelines set an explicit institutional line on AI use in commentary journalism: assistance with fact-checking, research and prose is fine, but AI cannot generate the ideas, arguments or substance of a piece.

insights.claim: The Interpreter, a Lowy Institute commentary outlet, permits contributors to use AI tools for fact-checking, research or prose refinement but explicitly bans using AI to generate the ideas, arguments or substance of a submitted article.
insights.speaker: Lowy Institute — The Interpreter
insights.so_what: An explicit, publicly stated AI-authorship boundary from a policy-commentary outlet is an early data point on how media and think-tank publishers are institutionalising norms around generative AI in content production.
insights.quote: Assistance with fact-checking, research or prose refinement is acceptable. Using AI to generate the ideas, arguments or substance is not.
insights.locator: We expect contributors to use AI tools responsibly

insights.claim: The Interpreter's editorial focus is the Asia-Pacific region's politics, security, economies and international relationships, though it also covers events elsewhere when they shape the regional order or carry lessons for it.
insights.speaker: Lowy Institute — The Interpreter
insights.so_what: Defines the outlet's coverage lens for anyone using it as a recurring Asia-Pacific signal source.

insights.claim: The Interpreter's readership spans Australia, Asia, the Pacific, North America and Europe, which the editors frame as reflecting the broad international audience that Asia-Pacific issues command.
insights.speaker: Lowy Institute — The Interpreter
insights.so_what: Signals the outlet's reach as a channel for shaping elite opinion on Asia-Pacific policy across multiple major markets.
insights.locator: Our readership spans Australia, Asia, the Pacific

insights.claim: The Interpreter accepts contributor drafts of up to 850 words in an op-ed style aimed at a general world-affairs audience rather than subject specialists, and only publishes original articles, not reprints.
insights.speaker: Lowy Institute — The Interpreter
insights.so_what: Useful for anyone assessing the outlet's format constraints or seeking to place commentary with it.
insights.locator: We accept drafts of up to 850 words
